title: Chancellor Search and Screen Committee named
summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, President of the Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents, and Chris Patton, Executive-in-Charge of the Universities of Wisconsin, have appointed a 23-member Search and Screen Committee to help identify the next UWвАУMadison chancellor.
